subject: Urgent Request: Backend Developer – PHP – Fintech
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Kredify
ROLE: Lead Backend Developer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 1025 SEK/h

The team works primarily with PHP, Azure and Kubernetes.

Key requirements:

  • PHP
  • Azure
  • Kubernetes

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maja Gustafsson
Tech Talent Specialist
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 72 122 34 56
